```{r}
# ============================================================
# ssGSEA pathway scoring and condition comparison across
# 0 nM / 17 nM / 68 nM DRAXIN
# ============================================================
#
# This script:
#   1) loads precomputed GSEA results from three pairwise comparisons,
#   2) inspects and selects full pathway gene sets of interest,
#   3) computes per-sample ssGSEA scores from batch-corrected logCPM data,
#   4) exports raw and standardized pathway score tables,
#   5) visualizes pathway activity across conditions,
#   6) tests pathway score differences across conditions using limma,
#   7) compares ssGSEA scores with mean pathway expression.
#
# IMPORTANT ABOUT STANDARDIZATION:
#   A) score_sd_all:
#      - z-score of raw ssGSEA values across ALL samples for each pathway
#      - useful for general visualization
#      - does NOT mean "relative to ctrl"
#
#   B) score_sd_ctrl:
#      - (sample score - ctrl mean) / ctrl SD for each pathway
#      - expresses each sample relative to the ctrl group only
#      - useful for ctrl-referenced plots
#
# STATISTICS:
#   - limma is fit on RAW ssGSEA scores, not on SD-scaled values
#
# GENE SET CONTENT:
#   - ssGSEA uses FULL pathway gene sets (not leading-edge subsets),
#     restricted to genes present in the processed expression matrix
# ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tibble)
  library(readr)
  library(stringr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(AnnotationDbi)
  library(org.Hs.eg.db)
  library(limma)
  library(GSVA)
  library(matrixStats)
  library(msigdbr)
  library(GO.db)
  library(grid)
})
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 0) Define input/output paths and verify required files
# ============================================================

run_label <- "2026_03_23_GSEA_edgeR_3comparisons_signedlogP"

comparisons <- c("DRAXIN_vs_ctrl", "diluted_vs_ctrl", "DRAXIN_vs_diluted")

base_dir <- file.path(getwd(), "bulkRNAseq", run_label)

out_dir <- file.path(getwd(), "bulkRNAseq", "PATHWAY_GSVA_SCORE_PANEL")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

expr_path <- file.path(getwd(), "bulkRNAseq", "Heatmaps_input", "expr_logCPM_TMM.rds")
meta_path <- file.path(getwd(), "bulkRNAseq", "Heatmaps_input", "meta2.csv")
stopifnot(file.exists(expr_path), file.exists(meta_path))

gsea_paths <- lapply(comparisons, function(comp) {
  list(
    GO_BP  = file.path(base_dir, comp, "GO",     paste0(run_label, "__", comp, "__gseGO_BP.rds")),
    GO_MF  = file.path(base_dir, comp, "GO",     paste0(run_label, "__", comp, "__gseGO_MF.rds")),
    MSIG_H = file.path(base_dir, comp, "MSigDB", paste0(run_label, "__", comp, "__msig_H.rds")),
    KEGG   = file.path(base_dir, comp, "KEGG",   paste0(run_label, "__", comp, "__gseKEGG.rds"))
  )
})
names(gsea_paths) <- comparisons

missing <- unlist(lapply(names(gsea_paths), function(comp) {
  p <- unlist(gsea_paths[[comp]])
  p[!file.exists(p)]
}))
if (length(missing) > 0) {
  stop("Missing GSEA files:\n", paste(missing, collapse = "\n"))
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 1) Load normalized expression matrix and sample metadata
# ============================================================

expr_mat <- readRDS(expr_path)

meta <- readr::read_csv(meta_path, show_col_types = FALSE) |> as.data.frame()
stopifnot("sample" %in% colnames(meta))
rownames(meta) <- meta$sample
meta$sample <- NULL

stopifnot(all(colnames(expr_mat) %in% rownames(meta)))
meta <- meta[colnames(expr_mat), , drop = FALSE]
stopifnot(all(colnames(expr_mat) == rownames(meta)))

# Remove Ensembl version suffix
rownames(expr_mat) <- sub("\\.\\d+$", "", rownames(expr_mat))
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 2) Define treatment labels, batch variable, and plotting colors
# ============================================================

meta$condition <- factor(meta$condition, levels = c("ctrl", "diluted_DRAXIN", "DRAXIN"))

cond_map <- c(ctrl = "0nM", diluted_DRAXIN = "17nM", DRAXIN = "68nM")
meta$condition_nm <- factor(cond_map[as.character(meta$condition)],
                            levels = c("0nM", "17nM", "68nM"))

batch_var <- "batch3"
if (!batch_var %in% colnames(meta)) {
  stop("batch_var not in meta: ", batch_var,
       "\nAvailable columns: ", paste(colnames(meta), collapse = ", "))
}
meta[[batch_var]] <- factor(meta[[batch_var]],
                            levels = c("exp1_altprep", "exp1_main", "exp2_main"))

cond_cols <- c("0nM" = "#4E79A7", "17nM" = "#59A14F", "68nM" = "#E15759")
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 3) Load GSEA result objects from all comparisons
# ============================================================

read_gsea_multi <- function(paths_by_comp,
                            slot_name = c("GO_BP", "GO_MF", "MSIG_H", "KEGG")) {
  slot_name <- match.arg(slot_name)
  out <- lapply(names(paths_by_comp), function(comp) {
    readRDS(paths_by_comp[[comp]][[slot_name]])
  })
  names(out) <- names(paths_by_comp)
  out
}

gsea_GO_BP_list  <- read_gsea_multi(gsea_paths, "GO_BP")
gsea_GO_MF_list  <- read_gsea_multi(gsea_paths, "GO_MF")
gsea_MSIG_H_list <- read_gsea_multi(gsea_paths, "MSIG_H")
gsea_KEGG_list   <- read_gsea_multi(gsea_paths, "KEGG")
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 4) Define helper functions for pathway lookup and gene mapping
# ============================================================

map_entrez_to_symbol <- function(entrez) {
  entrez <- unique(as.character(entrez))
  mp <- AnnotationDbi::select(
    org.Hs.eg.db,
    keys = entrez,
    keytype = "ENTREZID",
    columns = "SYMBOL"
  ) |>
    tibble::as_tibble()

  unique(mp$SYMBOL[!is.na(mp$SYMBOL) & mp$SYMBOL != ""])
}

show_gsea_terms_all <- function(gsea_list, pattern = NULL, n = 50) {
  combined <- lapply(names(gsea_list), function(comp) {
    tb <- tibble::as_tibble(gsea_list[[comp]]@result)
    tb$comparison <- comp
    tb
  }) |>
    dplyr::bind_rows()

  keep <- intersect(c("comparison", "ID", "Description", "NES", "p.adjust"),
                    names(combined))
  combined <- combined |>
    dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(keep))

  if (!is.null(pattern)) {
    combined <- combined |>
      dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(
        tolower(paste(ID, Description)),
        tolower(pattern)
      ))
  }

  combined |>
    dplyr::arrange(p.adjust) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = n)
}

show_kegg_all_with_sizes <- function(gsea_kegg_list, pattern = NULL, n = 50) {
  gs <- gsea_kegg_list[[1]]@geneSets
  gs_n <- tibble::tibble(ID = names(gs), n_genes = vapply(gs, length, integer(1)))

  combined <- lapply(names(gsea_kegg_list), function(comp) {
    tb <- tibble::as_tibble(gsea_kegg_list[[comp]]@result)
    tb$comparison <- comp
    tb
  }) |>
    dplyr::bind_rows()

  out <- combined |>
    dplyr::left_join(gs_n, by = "ID") |>
    dplyr::select(comparison, ID, Description, NES, p.adjust, n_genes) |>
    dplyr::distinct()

  if (!is.null(pattern)) {
    out <- out |>
      dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(
        tolower(paste(ID, Description)),
        tolower(pattern)
      ))
  }

  out |>
    dplyr::arrange(p.adjust) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = n)
}

kegg_symbols_from_gse_fullset_by_id <- function(gsea_kegg_list, kegg_id) {
  gse <- gsea_kegg_list[[1]]
  gs_list <- gse@geneSets

  if (!kegg_id %in% names(gs_list)) {
    stop("KEGG ID not found in geneSets: ", kegg_id,
         "\nExample available IDs: ",
         paste(head(names(gs_list), 5), collapse = ", "))
  }

  entrez <- gs_list[[kegg_id]]
  map_entrez_to_symbol(entrez)
}

show_hallmark_msigdbr <- function(pattern = NULL, n = 50) {
  hm <- msigdbr::msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", collection = "H") |>
    dplyr::group_by(gs_name, gs_description) |>
    dplyr::summarise(n_genes = dplyr::n_distinct(gene_symbol), .groups = "drop")

  if (!is.null(pattern)) {
    hm <- hm |>
      dplyr::filter(
        stringr::str_detect(tolower(gs_name), tolower(pattern)) |
          stringr::str_detect(tolower(gs_description), tolower(pattern))
      )
  }

  hm |>
    dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(n_genes), gs_name) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = n)
}

hallmark_symbols <- function(set_name) {
  msigdbr::msigdbr(species = "Homo sapiens", collection = "H") |>
    dplyr::filter(gs_name == set_name) |>
    dplyr::pull(gene_symbol) |>
    unique()
}

show_go_terms <- function(ontology = c("BP", "MF"), pattern = NULL, n = 50) {
  ontology <- match.arg(ontology)

  tt <- AnnotationDbi::select(
    GO.db,
    keys = AnnotationDbi::keys(GO.db, keytype = "GOID"),
    keytype = "GOID",
    columns = c("TERM", "ONTOLOGY")
  ) |>
    tibble::as_tibble() |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(TERM), ONTOLOGY == ontology) |>
    dplyr::distinct(GOID, TERM, ONTOLOGY)

  if (!is.null(pattern)) {
    tt <- tt |>
      dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(tolower(TERM), tolower(pattern)))
  }

  tt |>
    dplyr::arrange(TERM) |>
    dplyr::slice_head(n = n)
}

goid_to_symbols <- function(go_id) {
  entrez <- AnnotationDbi::select(
    org.Hs.eg.db,
    keys = go_id,
    keytype = "GOALL",
    columns = "ENTREZID"
  ) |>
    tibble::as_tibble() |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(ENTREZID)) |>
    dplyr::pull(ENTREZID) |>
    unique()

  map_entrez_to_symbol(entrez)
}

pick_go_by_text <- function(ontology = c("BP", "MF"), pattern, prefer_short = TRUE) {
  ontology <- match.arg(ontology)
  pat <- tolower(pattern)

  tt <- AnnotationDbi::select(
    GO.db,
    keys = AnnotationDbi::keys(GO.db, keytype = "GOID"),
    keytype = "GOID",
    columns = c("TERM", "ONTOLOGY")
  ) |>
    tibble::as_tibble() |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(TERM), ONTOLOGY == ontology)

  hit <- tt |>
    dplyr::filter(stringr::str_detect(tolower(TERM), pat))

  if (nrow(hit) == 0) {
    stop("No GO ", ontology, " term matched: ", pattern)
  }

  if (prefer_short) {
    hit <- hit |>
      dplyr::mutate(nchar_term = nchar(TERM)) |>
      dplyr::arrange(nchar_term)
  }

  hit[1, , drop = FALSE]
}

make_pathway_label <- function(x, wrap_width = 32) {
  x2 <- x |>
    stringr::str_replace("\\s*\\(n=\\d+\\)\\s*$", "") |>
    stringr::str_replace("^HALLMARK__", "HM: ") |>
    stringr::str_replace("^GOBP__", "BP: ") |>
    stringr::str_replace("^GOMF__", "MF: ") |>
    stringr::str_replace("^KEGG__", "KEGG: ") |>
    stringr::str_replace_all("__", ": ")
  stringr::str_wrap(x2, width = wrap_width)
}

std_limma_cols <- function(df) {
  df <- as.data.frame(df)
  n0 <- colnames(df)
  n1 <- tolower(n0)
  n1 <- gsub("[^a-z0-9]+", "_", n1)
  n1 <- gsub("^_+|_+$", "", n1)
  n1 <- sub("^adj_p_val$", "fdr", n1)
  n1 <- sub("^logfc$", "logFC", n1)
  colnames(df) <- n1
  df
}

p_to_stars <- function(p) {
  ifelse(is.na(p), "",
         ifelse(p < 0.001, "***",
                ifelse(p < 0.01, "**",
                       ifelse(p < 0.05, "*", "ns"))))
}
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 5) Inspect enriched pathways across comparisons
# ============================================================

cat("\n--- KEGG across ALL comparisons (includes full-set sizes) ---\n")
print(show_kegg_all_with_sizes(gsea_KEGG_list, n = 25), n = 25)

cat("\n--- KEGG search across ALL comparisons: 'ferroptosis' ---\n")
print(show_kegg_all_with_sizes(gsea_KEGG_list, "ferroptosis", n = 25), n = 25)

cat("\n--- GO BP terms enriched across ALL comparisons (top by q) ---\n")
print(show_gsea_terms_all(gsea_GO_BP_list, n = 25), n = 25)

cat("\n--- GO MF terms enriched across ALL comparisons (top by q) ---\n")
print(show_gsea_terms_all(gsea_GO_MF_list, n = 25), n = 25)

cat("\n--- Hallmark terms enriched across ALL comparisons (top by q) ---\n")
print(show_gsea_terms_all(gsea_MSIG_H_list, n = 25), n = 25)

cat("\n--- Hallmark universe (msigdbr) top by size ---\n")
print(show_hallmark_msigdbr(n = 25), n = 25)

cat("\n--- GO BP browse: 'cell adhesion' ---\n")
print(show_go_terms("BP", "cell adhesion", n = 25), n = 25)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 6) Define final full gene sets to score
# ============================================================

hallmark_terms <- c(
  OXPHOS = "HALLMARK_OXIDATIVE_PHOSPHORYLATION",
  E2F_TARGETS = "HALLMARK_E2F_TARGETS",
  MYC = "HALLMARK_MYC_TARGETS_V1",
  DNA_REPAIR = "HALLMARK_DNA_REPAIR",
  G2M = "HALLMARK_G2M_CHECKPOINT",
  CHOLESTEROL_HOMEOSTASIS = "HALLMARK_CHOLESTEROL_HOMEOSTASIS",
  UNFOLDED ="HALLMARK_UNFOLDED_PROTEIN_RESPONSE"
)

go_bp_1 <- pick_go_by_text("BP", "cell adhesion mediated by integrin")
go_bp_2 <- pick_go_by_text("BP", "regulation of cell adhesion")
go_bp_3 <- pick_go_by_text("BP", "SULFUR COMPOUND METABOLIC PROCESS")

go_mf_1 <- pick_go_by_text("MF", "oxidoreduction-driven active transmembrane transporter activity")
go_mf_2 <- pick_go_by_text("MF", "NADH dehydrogenase activity")
go_mf_3 <- pick_go_by_text("MF", "iron ion binding")
go_mf_4 <- pick_go_by_text("MF", "cell adhesion molecule binding")

gene_sets <- list()

for (nm in names(hallmark_terms)) {
  gene_sets[[paste0("HALLMARK__", nm)]] <- hallmark_symbols(hallmark_terms[[nm]])
}

gene_sets[[paste0("GOBP__", go_bp_1$GOID, "__", make.names(go_bp_1$TERM))]] <- goid_to_symbols(go_bp_1$GOID)
gene_sets[[paste0("GOBP__", go_bp_2$GOID, "__", make.names(go_bp_2$TERM))]] <- goid_to_symbols(go_bp_2$GOID)
gene_sets[[paste0("GOBP__", go_bp_3$GOID, "__", make.names(go_bp_3$TERM))]] <- goid_to_symbols(go_bp_3$GOID)
gene_sets[[paste0("GOMF__", go_mf_1$GOID, "__", make.names(go_mf_1$TERM))]] <- goid_to_symbols(go_mf_1$GOID)
gene_sets[[paste0("GOMF__", go_mf_2$GOID, "__", make.names(go_mf_2$TERM))]] <- goid_to_symbols(go_mf_2$GOID)
gene_sets[[paste0("GOMF__", go_mf_3$GOID, "__", make.names(go_mf_3$TERM))]] <- goid_to_symbols(go_mf_3$GOID)
gene_sets[[paste0("GOMF__", go_mf_4$GOID, "__", make.names(go_mf_4$TERM))]] <- goid_to_symbols(go_mf_4$GOID)

gene_sets[["KEGG__hsa04216__Ferroptosis"]] <-
  kegg_symbols_from_gse_fullset_by_id(gsea_KEGG_list, "hsa04216")

names(gene_sets) <- paste0(names(gene_sets), " (n=", sapply(gene_sets, length), ")")

gene_sets <- gene_sets[sapply(gene_sets, length) >= 10]
stopifnot(length(gene_sets) >= 2)

cat("\nSelected gene sets (PRE-intersection sizes):\n")
print(sort(sapply(gene_sets, length)))
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 7) Prepare batch-corrected expression matrix for ssGSEA
# ============================================================

design3 <- model.matrix(~ condition, data = meta)
expr_bc <- limma::removeBatchEffect(expr_mat,
                                    batch = meta[[batch_var]],
                                    design = design3)

ensg <- rownames(expr_bc)
mp <- AnnotationDbi::select(
  org.Hs.eg.db,
  keys = ensg,
  keytype = "ENSEMBL",
  columns = "SYMBOL"
) |>
  tibble::as_tibble() |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(SYMBOL) & SYMBOL != "") |>
  dplyr::distinct(ENSEMBL, .keep_all = TRUE)

expr_bc_sym <- expr_bc[mp$ENSEMBL, , drop = FALSE]
rownames(expr_bc_sym) <- mp$SYMBOL

expr_bc_sym <- expr_bc_sym[order(rowMeans(expr_bc_sym), decreasing = TRUE), , drop = FALSE]
expr_bc_sym <- expr_bc_sym[!duplicated(rownames(expr_bc_sym)), , drop = FALSE]

expr_for_gsva <- as.matrix(expr_bc_sym)

v <- matrixStats::rowVars(expr_for_gsva)
expr_for_gsva <- expr_for_gsva[v > 0, , drop = FALSE]

gene_sets_use <- lapply(gene_sets, function(gs) intersect(gs, rownames(expr_for_gsva)))
gene_sets_use <- gene_sets_use[sapply(gene_sets_use, length) >= 10]
stopifnot(length(gene_sets_use) >= 2)

cat("\nSelected gene sets (POST-intersection sizes actually used in ssGSEA):\n")
print(sort(sapply(gene_sets_use, length)))
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 8) Compute raw ssGSEA scores
# ============================================================

gsva_mat <- GSVA::gsva(
  expr = expr_for_gsva,
  gset.idx.list = gene_sets_use,
  method = "ssgsea",
  kcdf = "Gaussian",
  abs.ranking = FALSE,
  min.sz = 10,
  max.sz = 5000
)

scores_raw <- as.data.frame(t(gsva_mat))
scores_raw$sample <- rownames(scores_raw)
scores_raw$condition_nm <- meta[scores_raw$sample, "condition_nm"]

df_long_raw <- scores_raw |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(sample, condition_nm),
    names_to = "pathway",
    values_to = "ssgsea_score"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    condition_nm = factor(condition_nm, levels = c("0nM", "17nM", "68nM")),
    pathway_label = make_pathway_label(pathway, wrap_width = 34)
  )
```

```{r}

# ============================================================
# 9) Create two standardized versions of the raw ssGSEA scores
# ============================================================
#
# score_sd_all:
#   z-score across ALL samples within each pathway
#
# score_sd_ctrl:
#   (sample score - ctrl mean) / ctrl SD within each pathway
#   ctrl samples therefore center around 0 by definition
# ============================================================

sd_floor <- 1e-6

df_long <- df_long_raw |>
  dplyr::group_by(pathway) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    score_sd_all = as.numeric(scale(ssgsea_score)),
    ctrl_mean = mean(ssgsea_score[condition_nm == "0nM"], na.rm = TRUE),
    ctrl_sd = sd(ssgsea_score[condition_nm == "0nM"], na.rm = TRUE),
    ctrl_sd = ifelse(is.na(ctrl_sd) | ctrl_sd < sd_floor, NA_real_, ctrl_sd),
    score_sd_ctrl = (ssgsea_score - ctrl_mean) / ctrl_sd
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()

readr::write_csv(
  df_long |>
    dplyr::select(sample, condition_nm, pathway, pathway_label,
                  ssgsea_score, score_sd_all, ctrl_mean, ctrl_sd, score_sd_ctrl),
  file.path(out_dir, "PATHWAY_SCORES_GSVA_ssGSEA_raw_allSD_and_ctrlSD.csv")
)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 10) Plot overview panel using score_sd_all
# ============================================================
#
# IMPORTANT:
#   This plot uses score_sd_all:
#   pathway-wise z-score across ALL samples
#   It is not ctrl-referenced.
# ============================================================

p_overview <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = condition_nm, y = score_sd_all)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(color = condition_nm),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.12),
             size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cond_cols) +
  facet_wrap(~ pathway_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9)
  ) +
  labs(y = "Pathway activity (ssGSEA; z-score across all samples)")

out_pdf <- file.path(out_dir, "PATHWAY_SCORE_PANEL_GSVA_allSampleSD.pdf")
ggsave(out_pdf, p_overview, width = 11, height = 8)
```

```{r}

# ============================================================
# 11) Build selected publication panel using score_sd_all
# ============================================================
#
# IMPORTANT:
#   This publication panel also uses score_sd_all
#   so the y-axis is based on ALL-sample standardization
# ============================================================

main_order <- c(
  "HM: OXPHOS",
  "HM: E2F_TARGETS",
  "HM: CHOLESTEROL_HOMEOSTASIS",
  "HM: MYC",
  "HM: DNA_REPAIR",
  "HM: G2M",
  "HM: UNFOLDED"
)

ferro_label <- "KEGG: hsa04216: Ferroptosis"
iron_label  <- "MF: GO:0005506: iron.ion.binding"
order8 <- c(main_order, ferro_label, iron_label)

avail <- sort(unique(df_long$pathway_label))

cat("\n--- AVAILABLE pathway labels ---\n")
print(avail)

cat("\n--- EXPECTED selected labels ---\n")
print(order8)

cat("\n--- MISSING selected labels ---\n")
print(setdiff(order8, avail))

cat("\n--- EXTRA available labels ---\n")
print(setdiff(avail, order8))

order8 <- order8[order8 %in% unique(df_long$pathway_label)]
stopifnot(length(order8) == 9)

df_plot <- df_long |>
  dplyr::filter(pathway_label %in% order8) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    pathway_label = factor(pathway_label, levels = order8),
    condition_nm  = factor(condition_nm, levels = c("0nM", "17nM", "68nM"))
  )

use_fixed_y <- TRUE
use_ylim <- TRUE
ylim_vals <- c(-3, 3)

p_all <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = condition_nm, y = score_sd_all)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_point(aes(color = condition_nm),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.12),
             size = 2.0, alpha = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cond_cols) +
  facet_wrap(
    ~ pathway_label,
    ncol = 2,
    scales = if (use_fixed_y) "fixed" else "free_y"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 16),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 16),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.8, "lines")
  ) +
  labs(y = "Pathway activity (ssGSEA; z-score across all samples)")

if (use_ylim) {
  p_all <- p_all + coord_cartesian(ylim = ylim_vals)
}

out_pdf <- file.path(out_dir, "PATHWAY_PANEL_ALL8_2col_allSampleSD.pdf")
ggsave(out_pdf, p_all, width = 8, height = 17, units = "in", limitsize = FALSE)

base_size_pts <- 8
p_all_pub <- p_all +
  theme_bw(base_size = base_size_pts) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = base_size_pts + 8),
    axis.text.x  = element_text(size = base_size_pts + 4),
    axis.text.y  = element_text(size = base_size_pts + 4),
    strip.text   = element_text(size = base_size_pts + 4),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.6, "lines")
  )

fig_width <- 6
fig_height <- fig_width * 2

out_pdf <- file.path(out_dir, "PATHWAY_PANEL_ALL8_publication_allSampleSD.pdf")
ggsave(out_pdf, p_all_pub,
       width = fig_width, height = fig_height, units = "in",
       device = cairo_pdf)

out_svg <- file.path(out_dir, "PATHWAY_PANEL_ALL8_publication_allSampleSD.svg")
ggsave(out_svg, p_all_pub,
       width = fig_width, height = fig_height, units = "in",
       device = svglite::svglite)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 12) Test pathway score differences with limma on RAW ssGSEA scores
# ============================================================
#
# IMPORTANT:
#   limma is fit on RAW ssGSEA scores (ssgsea_score), not on score_sd_all
#   and not on score_sd_ctrl
# ============================================================

Y <- gsva_mat
meta_fit <- meta[colnames(Y), , drop = FALSE]
stopifnot(all(colnames(Y) == rownames(meta_fit)))

meta_fit$condition_nm <- factor(meta_fit$condition_nm, levels = c("0nM", "17nM", "68nM"))
meta_fit$condition_safe <- factor(
  meta_fit$condition_nm,
  levels = c("0nM", "17nM", "68nM"),
  labels = c("nM0", "nM17", "nM68")
)

design <- model.matrix(~0 + condition_safe, data = meta_fit)
colnames(design) <- levels(meta_fit$condition_safe)

fit <- limma::lmFit(Y, design)
cont <- limma::makeContrasts(
  `17vs0`  = nM17 - nM0,
  `68vs0`  = nM68 - nM0,
  `68vs17` = nM68 - nM17,
  levels = design
)

fit2 <- limma::eBayes(limma::contrasts.fit(fit, cont))
fitF <- limma::eBayes(fit)

tt_F <- limma::topTable(fitF, coef = NULL, number = Inf, sort.by = "F") |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("pathway") |>
  std_limma_cols()

tt_17vs0 <- limma::topTable(fit2, coef = "17vs0", number = Inf, sort.by = "P") |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("pathway") |>
  std_limma_cols()

tt_68vs0 <- limma::topTable(fit2, coef = "68vs0", number = Inf, sort.by = "P") |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("pathway") |>
  std_limma_cols()

tt_68vs17 <- limma::topTable(fit2, coef = "68vs17", number = Inf, sort.by = "P") |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column("pathway") |>
  std_limma_cols()

stats_tbl <- tt_F |>
  dplyr::select(pathway, f, p_value, fdr) |>
  dplyr::rename(F_overall = f, P_overall = p_value, FDR_overall = fdr) |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    tt_17vs0 |>
      dplyr::select(pathway, logFC, p_value, fdr) |>
      dplyr::rename(logFC_17vs0 = logFC, P_17vs0 = p_value, FDR_17vs0 = fdr),
    by = "pathway"
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    tt_68vs0 |>
      dplyr::select(pathway, logFC, p_value, fdr) |>
      dplyr::rename(logFC_68vs0 = logFC, P_68vs0 = p_value, FDR_68vs0 = fdr),
    by = "pathway"
  ) |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    tt_68vs17 |>
      dplyr::select(pathway, logFC, p_value, fdr) |>
      dplyr::rename(logFC_68vs17 = logFC, P_68vs17 = p_value, FDR_68vs17 = fdr),
    by = "pathway"
  )

readr::write_csv(
  stats_tbl,
  file.path(out_dir, "PATHWAY_STATS_limma_rawssGSEA.csv")
)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 13) Plot ctrl-referenced panel with significance annotations
# ============================================================
#
# IMPORTANT:
#   This plot uses score_sd_ctrl:
#   (sample score - ctrl mean) / ctrl SD
#   so all y-values are explicitly relative to the ctrl group
# ============================================================

ann <- stats_tbl |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    star_17vs0 = p_to_stars(FDR_17vs0),
    star_68vs0 = p_to_stars(FDR_68vs0)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(pathway, star_17vs0, star_68vs0)

ypos <- df_long |>
  dplyr::group_by(pathway) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    y_max = max(score_sd_ctrl, na.rm = TRUE),
    y_min = min(score_sd_ctrl, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    span = pmax(1, y_max - y_min),
    y1 = y_max + 0.10 * span,
    y2 = y_max + 0.22 * span
  )

ann_plot <- ypos |>
  dplyr::left_join(ann, by = "pathway") |>
  dplyr::left_join(
    df_long |>
      dplyr::distinct(pathway, pathway_label),
    by = "pathway"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    x1 = "0nM",
    x2 = "17nM",
    x3 = "68nM"
  )

p_ctrl <- ggplot(df_long, aes(x = condition_nm, y = score_sd_ctrl)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(aes(color = condition_nm),
             position = position_jitter(width = 0.12),
             size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cond_cols) +
  facet_wrap(~ pathway_label, scales = "fixed", ncol = 2) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9)
  ) +
  labs(y = "Pathway activity (ssGSEA; SD relative to ctrl)")

p_ctrl <- p_ctrl +
  geom_segment(
    data = ann_plot,
    aes(x = x1, xend = x2, y = y1, yend = y1),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = ann_plot,
    aes(x = x1, xend = x1, y = y1, yend = y1 - 0.03 * span),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = ann_plot,
    aes(x = x2, xend = x2, y = y1, yend = y1 - 0.03 * span),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = ann_plot,
    aes(x = 1.5, y = y1 + 0.03 * span, label = star_17vs0),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 3
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = ann_plot,
    aes(x = x1, xend = x3, y = y2, yend = y2),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = ann_plot,
    aes(x = x1, xend = x1, y = y2, yend = y2 - 0.03 * span),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    data = ann_plot,
    aes(x = x3, xend = x3, y = y2, yend = y2 - 0.03 * span),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  geom_text(
    data = ann_plot,
    aes(x = 2.0, y = y2 + 0.03 * span, label = star_68vs0),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 3
  )

out_pdf <- file.path(out_dir, "PATHWAY_SCORE_PANEL_GSVA_ctrlSD_withStats_limmaFDR.pdf")
ggsave(out_pdf, p_ctrl, width = 11, height = 8)
```

```{r}
# ============================================================
# 14) Diagnostic: compare ssGSEA score vs mean pathway expression
# ============================================================
#
# This diagnostic computes per-sample mean pathway expression using the
# same genes that entered ssGSEA and compares those values to raw ssGSEA.
#
# Standardization used here:
#   - ssgsea_z: z-score of raw ssGSEA across all samples within pathway
#   - mean_expr_z: z-score of mean pathway expression across all samples
# ============================================================

scores_raw_diag <- as.data.frame(t(gsva_mat))
scores_raw_diag$sample <- rownames(scores_raw_diag)
scores_raw_diag$condition_nm <- meta[scores_raw_diag$sample, "condition_nm"]

ssgsea_long_diag <- scores_raw_diag |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = -c(sample, condition_nm),
    names_to = "pathway",
    values_to = "ssgsea_score"
  )

mean_expr_long <- lapply(names(gene_sets_use), function(pw) {
  genes <- gene_sets_use[[pw]]
  submat <- expr_for_gsva[genes, , drop = FALSE]

  data.frame(
    sample = colnames(submat),
    pathway = pw,
    pathway_mean_expr = colMeans(submat, na.rm = TRUE),
    pathway_median_expr = apply(submat, 2, median, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_genes_used = nrow(submat),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}) |>
  dplyr::bind_rows()

diag_long <- ssgsea_long_diag |>
  dplyr::left_join(mean_expr_long, by = c("sample", "pathway")) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    pathway_label = make_pathway_label(pathway, wrap_width = 34),
    condition_nm = factor(condition_nm, levels = c("0nM", "17nM", "68nM"))
  ) |>
  dplyr::group_by(pathway) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    ssgsea_z = as.numeric(scale(ssgsea_score)),
    mean_expr_z = as.numeric(scale(pathway_mean_expr))
  ) |>
  dplyr::ungroup()

readr::write_csv(
  diag_long |>
    dplyr::select(
      sample, condition_nm, pathway, pathway_label,
      ssgsea_score, ssgsea_z,
      pathway_mean_expr, pathway_median_expr, mean_expr_z,
      n_genes_used
    ),
  file.path(out_dir, "DIAGNOSTIC_ssGSEA_vs_meanExpression_perSample.csv")
)

cor_tbl <- diag_long |>
  dplyr::group_by(pathway, pathway_label) |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    n_samples = sum(complete.cases(ssgsea_score, pathway_mean_expr)),
    pearson_r = suppressWarnings(cor(
      ssgsea_score, pathway_mean_expr,
      use = "pairwise.complete.obs",
      method = "pearson"
    )),
    spearman_rho = suppressWarnings(cor(
      ssgsea_score, pathway_mean_expr,
      use = "pairwise.complete.obs",
      method = "spearman"
    )),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(spearman_rho))

readr::write_csv(
  cor_tbl,
  file.path(out_dir, "DIAGNOSTIC_ssGSEA_vs_meanExpression_correlations.csv")
)

p_scatter <- ggplot(
  diag_long,
  aes(x = pathway_mean_expr, y = ssgsea_score, color = condition_nm)
) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.4) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cond_cols) +
  facet_wrap(~ pathway_label, scales = "free", ncol = 2) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    strip.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 8)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Mean pathway gene expression",
    y = "Raw ssGSEA score",
    color = "Condition",
    title = "Per-sample ssGSEA score vs mean pathway expression"
  )

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "DIAGNOSTIC_ssGSEA_vs_meanExpression_scatter.pdf"),
  p_scatter,
  width = 11,
  height = 8.5
)

p_mean_box <- ggplot(
  diag_long,
  aes(x = condition_nm, y = pathway_mean_expr, color = condition_nm)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.12), size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cond_cols) +
  facet_wrap(~ pathway_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 2) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(size = 9),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean pathway gene expression",
    title = "Mean pathway expression across conditions"
  )

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "DIAGNOSTIC_meanExpression_byCondition.pdf"),
  p_mean_box,
  width = 11,
  height = 8.5
)

diag_long_z <- diag_long |>
  dplyr::select(sample, condition_nm, pathway, pathway_label, ssgsea_z, mean_expr_z) |>
  tidyr::pivot_longer(
    cols = c(ssgsea_z, mean_expr_z),
    names_to = "metric",
    values_to = "value"
  ) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    metric = dplyr::recode(
      metric,
      ssgsea_z = "ssGSEA",
      mean_expr_z = "Mean expression"
    )
  )

p_compare <- ggplot(
  diag_long_z,
  aes(x = condition_nm, y = value, color = condition_nm)
) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA) +
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.12), size = 1.8) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cond_cols) +
  facet_grid(metric ~ pathway_label, scales = "free_y") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.text = element_text(size = 8),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 8)
  ) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Within-pathway z-score across all samples",
    title = "ssGSEA vs mean pathway expression"
  )

ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "DIAGNOSTIC_ssGSEA_vs_meanExpression_zscoreCompare.pdf"),
  p_compare,
  width = 14,
  height = 8.5,
  limitsize = FALSE
)

cat(
  "Wrote:\n",
  file.path(out_dir, "PATHWAY_SCORES_GSVA_ssGSEA_raw_allSD_and_ctrlSD.csv"), "\n",
  file.path(out_dir, "PATHWAY_SCORE_PANEL_GSVA_allSampleSD.pdf"), "\n",
  file.path(out_dir, "PATHWAY_PANEL_ALL8_publication_allSampleSD.pdf"), "\n",
  file.path(out_dir, "PATHWAY_PANEL_ALL8_publication_allSampleSD.svg"), "\n",
  file.path(out_dir, "PATHWAY_STATS_limma_rawssGSEA.csv"), "\n",
  file.path(out_dir, "PATHWAY_SCORE_PANEL_GSVA_ctrlSD_withStats_limmaFDR.pdf"), "\n",
  file.path(out_dir, "DIAGNOSTIC_ssGSEA_vs_meanExpression_perSample.csv"), "\n",
  file.path(out_dir, "DIAGNOSTIC_ssGSEA_vs_meanExpression_correlations.csv"), "\n",
  file.path(out_dir, "DIAGNOSTIC_ssGSEA_vs_meanExpression_scatter.pdf"), "\n",
  file.path(out_dir, "DIAGNOSTIC_meanExpression_byCondition.pdf"), "\n",
  file.path(out_dir, "DIAGNOSTIC_ssGSEA_vs_meanExpression_zscoreCompare.pdf"), "\n"
)
```
